2606.31446.title: Revising RVL-CDIP: Quantifying Errors and Test-Train Overlap
2606.31446.paper_summary: RVL-CDIP is a popular dataset for benchmarking document classifiers. However, the dataset contains ample amounts of label errors as well as non-trivial amounts of test-train overlap, both of which may impact model performance metrics. In this paper, we address these two problems by (1) finding and fixing label errors, and (2) detecting and addressing test-train overlap. We produce several variations of RVL-CDIP with label error and test-train overlap fixes, and benchmark document classification performance on these new RVL-CDIP variations. Our rigorous analysis of RVL-CDIP finds that the corpus contains 12\% label error and approximately 35% test-train duplication. Remediation sees improvements in classification accuracy when errors are removed, but sees decreases in accuracy when duplicates are removed. We additionally evaluate models on RVL-CDIP-N, an out-of-distribution benchmark, finding that training on error-corrected data substantially improves OOD generalization, with supervised models gaining an average of 8.1 percentage points in accuracy and improvements as large as 14 percentage points.
2606.31446.paper_summary_zh: RVL-CDIP 是一個流行的數據集，用於基準文檔分類器。<lb/>然而，該數據集包含大量的標籤錯誤以及非微不足道的測試-訓練重疊，這兩者都可能影響模型性能指標。<lb/>在本文中，我們通過 (1) 找出並修正標籤錯誤，以及 (2) 偵測並處理測試-訓練重疊來解決這兩個問題。<lb/>我們產生了幾個 RVL-CDIP 的變體，修正了標籤錯誤和測試-訓練重疊，並在這些新的 RVL-CDIP 變體上基準文檔分類性能。<lb/>我們對 RVL-CDIP 的嚴謹分析發現，該語料庫包含 12% 的標籤錯誤和大約 35% 的測試-訓練重複。<lb/>修正後，當錯誤被移除時，分類準確度有所提高，但當重複項被移除時，準確度則下降。<lb/>我們還在 RVL-CDIP-N 上評估模型，這是一個分佈外的基準，發現對於經過錯誤修正的數據進行訓練大幅改善了 OOD 泛化，監督模型的準確度平均提高了 8.1 個百分點，改善幅度最大達到 14 個百分點。
2606.31446.author: Stefan Larson et.al.
2606.31446.authors: Stefan Larson, Attila Nagy, Sam Desai, Cyrus Desai, Nicole C. Lima, Yixin Yuan, Siddharth Betala, Kaushal K. Prajapati, Jamiu T. Suleiman, Sharad Duwal, Kevin Leach
